## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

**Fixes Issue:** # (Add issue number here)

## Developer Checklist
Please check all that apply before submitting:
- [ ] My code passes local tests (`make test`).
- [ ] My code passes the linter (`make lint`).
- [ ] I have added new tests for my feature/bugfix.
- [ ] I have updated `README.md` (if necessary).
- [ ] I did NOT change the project version number (the maintainer will do this).
